T0386.title: Underground Method
T0386.definition: Refers to unlicensed lending platforms or loan-sharking rings that operate outside regulatory oversight using illegal methods.
T0386.description: These platforms typically operate beyond regulatory reach, lending privately through self-built apps or social groups. They are often associated with ultra-high interest rates and violent debt collection, making them hotbeds for fraudulent loan schemes and illegal operations. Borrowers who fall victim not only face financial loss but also potential physical threats.
T0386.usageExample: For the past 9 months, I've basically been relying on underground lenders to make repayments.

references.title: 2024 H1 Credit Fraud Risk Landscape Report
Black Market Big Data: Exposing Malicious Loan Brokers
